title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.860 - Nonresident property owner defined
text:
67.860.  Nonresident property owner defined. — The term "nonresident property owner" as used in sections 67.800 to 67.860 is defined as any person whose residence is outside the boundaries of the political subdivision or taxing district.
(L. 1969 S.B. 156 § 8)
